title: Oyaayiye Yaayiye lyrics Ayan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Aayiye Aayiye 
Singer: Benny Dayal, Hariharan, Chinmayi
(male - Beny dayal)

hoaaahiyeayaahi yeayaaahi yeayaaaahi
thoovum poomalai nenjile...
ovaaasame swasame vasame
vandhu maiyal kondathu yenile..

nenjukkul nulaindhu moochukkul alaindhu
kannukkul malarkinra kanavu nee
yenkaiyil valaindhu yenmeedhu meethandhu
salayil nadakindra nilavu nee

neeyum neeyum adi neethaana neela neela nira theethaana
theeyil theeyil vila thithikkindren naanthaana.....
neeyum neeyum adi neethaana neela neela nira theethaana
theeyil theeyil vila thithikkindren naanthaana.....

hoaaahiyeayaahi yeayaaahi yeayaaaahi thoovum poomalai nenjile...
vhovaaasame swasame vasame vandhu maiyal kondathu yenile..
nenjukkul nulaindhu moochukkul alaindhu kannukkul malarkinra kanavu nee
yenkaiyil valaindhu yenmeedhu meethandhu maalayil nadakindra nilavu nee

(male -Haricharan)
oru kannil oru kannil amudhamum maru kannil maru kannil madhuramum
sumakindra sumakindra azhakiyavale

(female -chinmayi)
oru kayil oru kayil suhangalum maru kayil maru kayil smaigalum
yenakkule kodukindra iniyavanee

ethal poovendral athil thyenyenge ingu
poovethaan thyen thyen theyn(honey) theyn theyn
vovhooooohoooooooooooooooohoooovohhoooooooooo
hoaaahiyeayaahi yeayaaahi yeayaaaahi thoovum poomalai nenjile...
vhovaaasame swasame vasame vandhu maiyal kondathu yenile..

nenjukkul nulaindhu moochukkul alaindhu
kannukkul malarkinra kanavu nee
yenkaiyil valaindhu yenmeedhu meethandhu
maalayil nadakindra ninaivu nee ...

immaikatha imaikaatha kangalum
yenakaaga yenakaaga vendi nee
unnaikandu unnaikandu rasithene..

mudhal mutham muthal mutham thandhathum
ethal mutham ethal mutham
yenrathum athai yeni athai yeni inithenee..

sudum poongaatre suttu pogaathe
inivaninge malichaaral poovaai .
hoaaahiyeayaahi yeayaaahi
yeayaaaahi thoovum poomalai nenjile...
vhovaaasame swasame vasame
vandhu maiyal kondathu yenile..

nenjukkul nulaindhu moochukkul alaindhu
kannukkul malarkinra kanavu nee

maalayil nadakindra nilavu nee ...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Oyaayiye Yaayiye'?

The song conveys a sense of love and longing, celebrating the joy of togetherness.

In which movie is 'Oyaayiye Yaayiye' featured?

This song is featured in the movie Ayan.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and Chinmayi.

Who composed the music for 'Oyaayiye Yaayiye'?

The music for this song was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Oyaayiye Yaayiye' released?

The song was released on January 21, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Ayan, Oyaayiye Yaayiye serves as a vibrant celebration of love and connection. The song's upbeat tempo and romantic lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, perfectly complementing the film's narrative. With its catchy melody and engaging vocals, it captures the essence of youthful romance. This duet not only enhances the film's emotional depth but also leaves a lasting impression on the audience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oyaayiye Yaayiye from Ayan is a vibrant duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and celebration. With the enchanting voices of Benny Dayal and Chinmayi, this song is a delightful blend of energetic beats and romantic lyrics. Experience the magic of this collaboration that makes it a must-listen for any occasion!
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, a fragrant garland blooms... My breath, my life, has come to me, holding my essence.
In my heart, a thread flows, in my breath, a fragrance lingers, in my eyes, a dream is blossoming, you are in my hands, shining above me, the moon is walking in the sky.
You are you, is it you? The blue, blue color is not fading, I am dancing in the fire... You are you, is it you? The blue, blue color is not fading, I am dancing in the fire...

In my heart, a fragrant garland blooms... My breath, my life, has come to me, holding my essence. In my heart, a thread flows, in my breath, a fragrance lingers, in my eyes, a dream is blossoming, you are in my hands, shining above me, the moon is walking in the sky.
In one eye, there is sweetness, in another eye, there is sweetness, beauty is blooming, shining brightly.
In one hand, there are joys, in another hand, there are smiles, you are giving me sweetness, oh beautiful one.
When flowers bloom, they bring sweetness here, honey, honey, honey... In my heart, a fragrant garland blooms... My breath, my life, has come to me, holding my essence.
In my heart, a thread flows, in my breath, a fragrance lingers, in my eyes, a dream is blossoming, you are in my hands, shining above me, the moon is walking in the sky, you are my thought...
Now and forever, my eyes are for you, I have seen you and I am enjoying you.
The first kiss, the first kiss given, the last kiss, the last kiss said, I will remember that.
The fragrant flower should not fade away, it should bloom beautifully. In my heart, a fragrant garland blooms... My breath, my life, has come to me, holding my essence.
In my heart, a thread flows, in my breath, a fragrance lingers, in my eyes, a dream is blossoming, you are in my hands, shining above me, the moon is walking in the sky.
You are you, is it you? The blue, blue color is not fading, I am dancing in the fire... You are you, is it you? The blue, blue color is not fading, I am dancing in the fire.
